title: Pseudo vs True Randomness: Chaos vs Stochastic Deep

key_theorem.statement: For observation windows t >> τ_L = 1/λ, a deterministic chaotic system and an SDE with matched statistics are EML-∞ indistinguishable: both generate sequences with K(x_n) ≈ Θ(n) (incompressible). The distinction (deterministic vs stochastic) is only visible at t << τ_L (EML-2).

strange_attractors.name: Logistic map (r=3.9)
strange_attractors.eml_reason: Strange attractor: Cantor-set-like structure = fractal = EML-∞; SRB measure is EML-∞

strange_attractors.name: Hénon map
strange_attractors.eml_reason: Fractal attractor with dimension 1.26 (non-integer) → EML-∞; SRB measure not smooth

strange_attractors.name: Circle map (rotation by √2)
strange_attractors.eml_reason: Quasi-periodic on circle: trajectory dense but EML-3 (parametrized by exp(2πi√2·n))

strange_attractors.name: Lorenz attractor
strange_attractors.eml_reason: Butterfly wings: fractal, non-integer Hausdorff dimension → EML-∞

lyapunov_time.eml_long_time: EML-∞ (EML-2 initial condition → EML-∞ after n·τ_L steps)

chaotic_ode.power_spectrum: Broad band with peaks: rational + EML-3

sde_vs_ode.indistinguishability: For t >> τ_L = 1/λ, a chaotic ODE and an SDE with matched mean/variance are EML-∞ indistinguishable: both generate sequences with K(x_n) ≈ Θ(n).

periodic_orbit.description: Dirac masses on periodic points: EML-0

quasi_periodic.description: Lebesgue measure on torus: EML-3 (parametrized by angles)

poisson_sde.description: Stationary measure of counting process = Poisson = EML-1

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Periodic orbit invariant measure; fixed points
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Autocorrelation decay exp(-λτ); Ornstein-Uhlenbeck stationary measure; Gaussian SDE
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Short-time ODE trajectory; Kaplan-Yorke dimension; recurrence time power law
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Strange attractor SRB measure; Brownian paths; chaotic trajectories t>>τ_L

connections.to_session_71: Session 71: PRNG=EML-2. Session 82: chaos also EML-2 short-time → EML-∞ long-time
connections.to_session_64: SDE paths = EML-∞; expectations = EML-3 (Feynman-Kac). Session 82 compares to chaos.
